params.name: Jack's Magic Bean
params.description: This magic bean can grow into a stalk that reaches the cloud. If you're fit enough, you can climb up to a giant's castle, wherein is a hen that lays golden eggs. So far, however, only a young boy named Jack has ever made it there.
